mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ingredients ORDER BY FIELD(category,'원두','유제품','시럽/소스','파우더','차류','소모품','기타'), name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingredients (name, category, unit, stock_qty, min_stock, unit_cost, supplier) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{stock_qty}, #{min_stock}, #{unit_cost}, #{supplier})
mapper.update: UPDATE ingredients SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, stock_qty = #{stock_qty}, min_stock = #{min_stock}, unit_cost = #{unit_cost}, supplier = #{supplier} WHERE id = #{id}
